title: Sour Savory German Sauerkraut Bowl
description: A tangy, savory German-inspired dish featuring sauerkraut, English mustard, and a fluffy egg topping, served in a hot stone bowl. No onions or garlic in sight!
instructions: In a large bowl, mix together the sauerkraut, English mustard, and a pinch of salt.
In a large skillet, cook the bacon over medium heat until crispy.
Remove the bacon from the skillet and set aside, leaving the grease behind.
Add the beef strips to the skillet and cook until browned, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the mustard greens to the skillet and cook until wilted.
In a separate bowl, whisk together the eggs and a pinch of salt.
Pour the egg mixture over the sauerkraut mixture and stir to combine.
Transfer the mixture to a large stone bowl and top with the cooked beef and bacon.
In a small bowl, mix together the potato starch and a pinch of salt.
Sprinkle the potato starch mixture over the top of the egg mixture.
Drizzle with vegetable oil and serve hot.
Garnish with fresh parsley and serve immediately.
Serve immediately in the hot stone bowl.
